startups.name: NeuroVision
startups.description: Enterprise-grade synthetic data generation platform designed for medical and legal compliance. Fine-tuned specialized models that achieve 99.8% semantic accuracy while remaining 100% compliant with privacy regulations.
startups.impact: Generated 50B+ synthetic clinical tokens; reduced model training data cost by 70% for Fortune 500 partners.

projects.title: AstraNet
projects.description: Deep learning architecture built for galaxy cluster segmentation and noise reduction in low-light celestial imaging. Achieved state-of-the-art segmentation maps on Hubble Deep Field subsets.

projects.title: OmniFlow
projects.description: A high-performance Rust framework compiling web applications to WASM, featuring auto-syncing distributed state machines and immediate reactivity without virtual DOM overhead.

projects.title: SentientEye
projects.description: A real-time compute-constrained computer vision suite deployed on drone microcontrollers for spatial mapping, obstacle avoidance, and optical flow estimation in GPS-denied environments.

projects.title: DevAgent.AI
projects.description: An autonomous AI software engineering agent that parses code directories, writes comprehensive unit tests, resolves build issues, and optimizes slow algorithms completely in the background.

timeline.description: Oracle Database Developer or Administrator manages, secures, and optimizes data storage and retrieval using SQL and PL/SQL

timeline.company: gh raisoni college of engineering pune
timeline.description: Specialized in Deep Learning and Computer Vision. Researched multi-modal fusion networks
